gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/254)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/254)
text: شَكَتِ الْكَعْبَةُ إِلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَا تَلْقَى مِنْ أَنْفَاسٍ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ فَأَوْحَى اللَّهُ إِلَيْهَا قِرِّي كَعْبَةُ فَإِنِّي مُبْدِلُكِ بِهِمْ قَوْماً يَتَنَظَّفُونَ بِقُضْبَانِ الشَّجَرِ
فَلَمَّا بَعَثَ اللَّهُ مُحَمَّداً ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَوْحَى إِلَيْهِ مَعَ جَبْرَئِيلَ ( عليه السلام ) بِالسِّوَاكِ وَ الْخِلَالِ .

en.hubeali: Sahl Bin Mansour Bin Al Abbas, from Ibn Abu Najran, or someone else, from Hanaan, from his father,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The Kabah complained to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic what is faced from the (smelly) breating from the Polytheists. So Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Revealed unto it: “Calm down, Kabah, for I<sup>azwj</sup> would be Replacing them with a people who would be cleaning (their teeth) with the twigs of the tree”.
So when Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Sent Muhammad<sup>azwj</sup>, Revealed unto him<sup>saww</sup> with Jibraeel<sup>as</sup> with the brushing of the teeth, and picking the teeth (with a tooth-pick)’.
en.sarwar: 32. Sahl ibn Ziyad has narrated from Mansur ibn al-‘Abbas from ibn abu Najran or others from Hanan from his father who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Al-Ka‘bah complained before Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, against the bad breath of the pagans. Allah sent a revelation that said, ‘Calm down. I will replace them with a people who will use twigs for cleaning up their mouths. 5 Allah then raised Muhammad, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, and Jibril brought him revelation that instructed him to brush and clean up his mouth.’”
